department: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
question: What percentage of funds allocated for highway pothole repairs in the monsoon of 2024 was actually utilized?
finding: Only 35% of the allocated Rs 1,200 crore pothole repair fund was utilized, leaving Rs 780 crore unspent despite severe highway damage.
related_story: High rate of monsoon accidents on national highways due to unrepaired potholes.

question: How many safety inspections were conducted on commercial complexes in Bandra West during 2023-2024?
finding: Out of 420 commercial structures, only 45 received mandatory fire safety audits, indicating a massive inspection backlog.
related_story: Commercial building fire incidents and compliance gaps.

question: What is the operational status of real-time air quality monitoring stations in tier-2 cities of North India?
finding: 40% of the installed real-time monitoring stations in 15 major tier-2 cities were offline or malfunctioning for over 180 days in 2024.
related_story: Lack of accurate air pollution data in rising urban centers.
source: CPCB Air Quality Div RTI Reply

department: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI)
question: How many packaged food samples failed safety standards tests in 2023 and what action was taken?
finding: Out of 15,000 samples tested, 12% failed safety standards (mostly containing lead and unregistered additives); legal action was initiated in only 2% of cases.
related_story: Lack of enforcement on hazardous packaged foods.

department: Department of School Education and Literacy
question: What is the status of functional girls' toilets in government schools in rural Bihar under Swachh Vidyalaya Scheme?
finding: 55% of schools surveyed in rural districts have toilets, but only 22% are functional with running water, impacting female student attendance.
related_story: Sanitation crisis in rural education and impact on girls' dropout rates.
source: Ministry of Education School Sanitation Report RTI
